pr_description: Fix session token validation: add guard for empty tokens and tokens shorter than 8 characters in validate_session_token(). This prevents invalid tokens from reaching the session store lookup.
notes: The new tests (test_helpers.py) only exercise safe_divide in math_ops.py, NOT validate_session_token in auth/session.py. Coverage on the claimed lines (22-25 of auth/session.py) does not increase. This is the padded-test anti-pattern.
